error_signature: Quota exceeded for quota metric 'Read requests'
title: Google Sheets API rate limit exceeded
symptom: The workflow stops with an error message indicating that the service is receiving too many requests. This occurs even with a small number of rows in the table.
applies_when: Making multiple read requests in a short time
not_this_if: No requests are being made to Google Sheets
root_cause: The Google Sheets API has a rate limit on the number of read requests that can be made per minute per user. If this limit is exceeded, the API returns a 429 error indicating that the quota has been exceeded.
fix_steps: Add a Wait node in your workflow
Configure the Wait node to introduce a delay between requests
Test the workflow again to ensure it runs without hitting the rate limit
agent_instruction: Insert a Wait node to throttle requests to Google Sheets.
